positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna overlapping geometric mandalas. The central composition features stylized, floating jellyfish-like organisms entangled with delicate roots and crystal formations. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, iridescent turquoise, and neon magenta, contrasted sharply against an absolute black background. Clean, minimalist silhouette style, inspired by Art Deco and sacred geometry. Highly detailed etching quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel, vector art look, perfect circular crop, symmetrical balance, strong graphic impact.
negative: blurry, noisy, ugly, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, gradient, low contrast, photorealistic, dirty, smudge, bokeh, --ar 16:9, --s 700
